title: BBS Fbx Addon
description: Compatibility with models that use the FBX format for BBS CML EDITION
body:
# 📦 BBS Fbx Addon

As the name suggests, the **BBS Fbx Addon** brings the power of **FBX models** directly into your animations! This highly versatile format offers incredible quality that can match, or even surpass, the traditional BOBJ format.

### 🛠️ How to Use
Using this addon is incredibly simple and requires no complicated setup:

1. Simply place your FBX model anywhere within your **`assets`** folder.
2. That's it! Your model is now fully loaded and ready to be used in-game.

---

### ⚠️ Important Notice & Known Issues

> **Heavy Dependencies:** Please keep in mind that this addon is quite heavy due to the extensive background dependencies required to support the FBX format. 
>
> **Potential Render Glitch:** Because of its size, there is a small possibility that it might prevent your models from loading correctly. **Don't worry—your files are not corrupted!** They simply will fail to render on screen. 

We are actively working on a solution, and **this will be fixed in a future update**. If you happen to run into this rendering issue in the meantime, you can safely disable the addon without breaking your game, and simply enable it only for special occasions when FBX support is absolutely necessary.

---

### 👥 Credits
* **Original Feature Contributed by:** Eleeterly (for BBS CML EDITION)
* **Adapted into a Standalone Addon by:** ElGatoPro300
